content: Walking Skeleton (Alistair Cockburn): thinnest possible end-to-end slice through every architectural layer, built and wired together first, before adding width/features. Recommended build order is hardest/riskiest integration first as a 'tracer bullet', then grow via vertical slices. For this project this implies: get sim-clock -> aircraft-state -> render pipeline wired for one hardcoded aircraft flying a fixed path before building real navdata, instruction handling, or separation logic.
